definition: Read surface from TRANSFORM.DEV concept_rent_market_monthly into ANALYTICS for cohort medians z-scores and vs-market ratios per MODEL_FEATURE_ESTIMATION_PLAYBOOK. dbt model feature_rent_market_monthly_spine.sql alias feature_rent_market_monthly. Snowflake ANALYTICS.DBT_DEV.FEATURE_RENT_MARKET_MONTHLY. Grain vendor_code month_start geo from concept.
Illustrative MODEL_* composite score placeholder; replace with production model when MODEL_* ships. Ties model_type composite to rent concept at CBSA monthly grain.
Illustrative ESTIMATE_* lower interval row; pair with estimate_type_code=point when point+interval forecasts exist per MODEL_FEATURE_ESTIMATION_PLAYBOOK §4.

Union read surface over Zillow research FACT_ZILLOW_DAYS_ON_MARKET_AND_PRICE_CUTS and FACT_ZILLOW_FOR_SALE_LISTINGS with catalog metric_id MET_042 (metric_code zillow_days_on_market_and_price_cuts_metric_value) vs MET_043 per SERVING_DEMO_METRICS_CATALOG_MAP. dbt model feature_listings_velocity_monthly_spine.sql alias feature_listings_velocity_monthly.

Placeholder FEATURE registry; tie inputs via metric_derived_input. When MET_052 promotes, set primary_metric_code to rent_median_psf_zip_monthly_planned and is_active=TRUE after ANALYTICS path is documented.
Placeholder composite MODEL at CBSA monthly; metric_derived_input lists DOM/listings/HUD CBSA controls until MODEL_* ships.
Placeholder ESTIMATE interval row for corridor arbitrage stack (WL_022); metric_derived_input ties CoStar/Markerr rent until production estimate lands.

County-month FEATURE panel on ANALYTICS.DBT_DEV.FEATURE_MULTIFAMILY_MARKET_RANKER_MONTHLY combining Markerr rent Cherre stock RCA construction ACS and BLS LAUS inputs per feature_multifamily_market_ranker_monthly_spine.sql.
